arts.ttl: Tony Mowbray issues Isaac Price fitness update amid West Brom play-off tilt
arts.sum: The Northern Ireland international started on the bench in the 1-0 loss to Norwich with a calf complaint from international duty but he is ready to go against Tony Mowbray's former team on Saturday lunchtime. Tony Mowbray issues Isaac Price fitness update amid West Brom play-off tilt
